'''Latt''' was the third planet in the [[Demar system/Legends|Demar system]]. By the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], it had been reduced to a nearly barren rock by the [[Lant Mining Corporation]]. A few workers had remained on the planet to seal the deep mine shafts and salvage the leftover mining equipment and buildings. Latt had one moon.

*<!-- 1995-04-XX -->''[[Flashpoint! Brak Sector]]''
